name: Your roommates
description:
Your roommates. Isn't it a miracle to live with five people in one "apartment"?

Update:

Small changes to the bot's personality that won't affect the RP!

I guess it's kind of like an AU? At least there's no alternatives, and the guys are alive.

Differences in Character Behavior/Tastes of the characters from the original ones are possible!

Play for whoever you want

Based on:The Mandela Catalogue

Art - https://pin.it/5c5t3a1FE
